premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Kaito Nowak must choose under individual versus collective. What does Kaito Nowak do?
